method: Owner's existing Chrome Discord session, screenshot-based read-only inspection. No messages were sent and no server settings were changed.

visibleSystems: advertisement, Roblox group, capes and outfits
game nights, giveaways, events, training, tryouts and raids
wars, war-line-chat, scores, main-line, EU rosters, roster logs and mainer
Paradise | Türkiye.classification: Existing clan/mixed structure; requires backup and owner-approved rebuild before replacement.

visibleSystems: announcements, updates, uploads and Fieel info
Fieel's Community.classification: Community/Fima structure. No visible challenge, ranking or roster channels; this supports keeping the Community template free of those systems by default.

visibleSystems: rules, role guide, welcome and blacklist
announcements, applications, reaction roles, memories, polls, boosts and update log
TSBTR Yedek.channelFinding: The rules channel was opened at its beginning and no rule panel/message was present.
TSBTR Yedek.classification: Incomplete backup/ranking-community structure that needs guide and panel installation after explicit rebuild confirmation.

limits: Discord's accessibility DOM snapshot failed in the connected Chrome integration, so verification used small screenshot-based reads.
A full upward scroll of every important channel and every pinned message is not claimed.
Reference screenshots supplied by the owner remain OWNER PROVIDED REFERENCE unless separately verified here.
